## MutationNamesFor type

Returns the mutation names for a given module. They are the namespaced mutations.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type MutationNamesFor<ModuleName extends XModuleName> = keyof ExtractMutations<XModulesTree[ModuleName]>;
```
<b>References:</b> [XModuleName](./x-components.xmodulename.md)<!-- -->, [ExtractMutations](./x-components.extractmutations.md)<!-- -->, [XModulesTree](./x-components.xmodulestree.md)
